meta.title: Systemic — CRM for Small & Medium Business
meta.description: Clients, appointments, sales, inventory, finances & communications — all in one system.

hero.title: CRM for small and medium business
hero.subtitle: Clients, appointments, sales, inventory, finances & communications — all in one system. Get started in 5 minutes.
hero.trustLine: Free to start · No credit card required

painPoints.title: Sound familiar?
painPoints.subtitle: Systemic solves everyday challenges of small business

items.title: Clients get lost
items.description: Contacts scattered across notebooks, messengers and spreadsheets. No single database with interaction history.

items.title: Finances in chaos
items.description: You don't know your real profit. Cash doesn't add up, salaries calculated manually, expenses get lost.

items.title: Inventory out of control
items.description: Products run out unexpectedly. No tracking of stock levels, write-offs or purchases.

items.title: Everything manual, everything slow
items.description: Hours on routine: appointments in notebooks, invoices in Excel, reminders from memory. Business can't scale.

features.title: Everything your business needs
features.subtitle: From client appointments to financial results — one tool instead of ten

items.title: Client Database
items.description: Client cards with visit history, purchases, contacts and categories. Search and filter by any field.

items.title: Appointment Calendar
items.description: Drag-and-drop calendar with recurring appointments, multiple services and staff filtering.

items.title: Sales & Orders
items.description: Full order cycle: create, confirm, pack, ship. Nova Poshta integration for delivery.

items.title: Inventory Management
items.description: Products, stock levels, purchases, stock movements. Automatic write-off on sales.

items.title: Financial Module
items.description: Transactions, cash register, shifts, financial results. Complete P&L picture in real time.

items.title: Telegram Bot
items.description: Two-way messaging with clients, automatic appointment reminders — directly in Telegram.

items.title: Payroll & Motivation
items.description: Flexible motivation schemes: service percentage, fixed rate, bonuses. Automatic calculation.

items.title: Fiscal Receipts (Checkbox)
items.description: Integration with Checkbox fiscal register. Compliant fiscal receipts per Ukrainian law.

showcases.title: Clients & appointments — fully under control
showcases.description: Unified client database with complete history: visits, purchases, messages. Drag-and-drop calendar for quick day planning.
bullets: Client cards with categories and tags

showcases.title: From order to delivery
showcases.description: Create orders, track statuses, ship via Nova Poshta. Automatic inventory write-off and waybill creation.

showcases.title: Finances & analytics in real time
showcases.description: Know how much you earn every day. Cash register, transactions, financial results, payroll — all automatic.

howItWorks.title: Get started in 5 minutes
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to automate your business

steps.title: Sign up
steps.description: Create an account and set up your business: name, locations, services.

steps.title: Add your team
steps.description: Invite staff, configure roles and work schedules.

steps.title: Start working!
steps.description: Book clients, sell products, track finances. Everything in one place.

pricing.title: Transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees. All modules included.

items.name: Olena K.
items.text: Finally everything in one place. I used to keep appointments in a notebook and finances in Excel. Now I see the full picture in 5 minutes.

items.name: Andriy M.
items.text: The Telegram bot is pure magic. Clients get reminders and we see their replies right in the CRM.

items.name: Maria S.
items.text: Inventory and sales work flawlessly. We ship orders via Nova Poshta directly from the system.

items.question: Do I need to install any software?
items.answer: No. Systemic works in the browser — on desktop, tablet and phone. Nothing to install.

items.question: Is there a free plan?
items.answer: Yes, the Starter plan is free forever. You can upgrade to a paid plan when your business needs more features.

items.question: Can I migrate data from another system?
items.answer: Yes, we'll help migrate your data from Excel or another CRM. Contact our support team.

items.question: Does it work on mobile?
items.answer: Yes, the responsive interface works on any device with a browser — smartphone, tablet, laptop.

items.question: Is there a fiscal receipt integration?
items.answer: Yes, integration with Checkbox fiscal register for creating compliant fiscal receipts per Ukrainian law.

items.question: How many staff members can I add?
items.answer: On the free plan — up to 2. On paid plans — unlimited.

cta.title: Ready to automate your business?
cta.subtitle: Join Systemic — start for free today
